content: agent1: implementing 'throw error if resolve methods yield empty bytes' in llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py - adding zero-byte checks to resolve_image/resolve_audio/resolve_document methods. Will touch that file, let me know if you're also touching it.

agent1: done - added zero-byte checks (seek to end, tell(), raise ValueError if size==0) inside resolve_image/resolve_audio/resolve_document in types.py, right after the resolve_binary() call. I did not rename or change signatures of those methods, so your _with_size wrappers should work as before, and will now also raise ValueError if the underlying data is empty (probably desirable). No conflicts expected.
